title: Show score-grid gauge from champion-version evaluation
description: Scorecard score-grid gauges currently use the newest evaluation for the score, regardless of scoreVersionId. They should show the latest alignment metric for the current champion version only.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed the scorecard score-grid metric source. Grid score cards now carry championVersionId, query listEvaluationByScoreVersionIdAndCreatedAt for the champion version, and render the Alignment metric explicitly instead of using the latest score-wide evaluation.
